texto: When you become too special in life and death comes, you are only given an expensive burial, follow remembrance if too special, nothing more. Life just continue being expensive than you think with each generation.
explicacao: Citação de Osasumwenfrank sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “When you become too special in life and death comes, you are only given an expensive burial, foll…” articula reflexao, humanity, special em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e reflexao.
